low_risk_zone_equation.strength_term: A_zone = mix(S_low_score, R_low, S_system_steady_score, M_brain_direct_v25, R_train_v31)
low_risk_zone_equation.learning_term: L_zone = mix(L_low, L_system_steady, D_feature_v25, B_plastic_v31, R_train_v31)
low_risk_zone_equation.system_term: M_zone = A_zone + S_zone + R_zone + L_zone - P_zone

project_readout.summary: low-risk steady zone validation checks whether the low-risk steady amplification trend starts forming a stable low-risk zone.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this low-risk zone keeps expanding under larger, longer and higher-pressure system conditions.
